## Summary

What does this PR change? One or two sentences.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? Link the issue it closes if there is one
(`Closes #NN`).

## Changes

- Bullet list of the notable changes
- Including any public API changes

## Test plan

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `pytest` (fast subset) passes locally
- [ ] `pytest -m slow` passes locally (if this PR touches relaxation,
      multi-layer, or strain extraction)
- [ ] New tests added for new code / regression test added for bug fixes
- [ ] Examples still run end-to-end (if this PR touches anything they use)

## Notes for reviewer

Anything that needs extra attention — tricky bits, intentional trade-offs,
follow-ups deferred to a later PR, etc.
